---
title: "Equation Library"
description: "The mathematical foundations of quant finance and machine learning — each concept from equation to Python."
listing:
  id: published-equations
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
toc: true
---

The mathematical foundations behind everything else on this site. This is my
*proof of work*: rather than assume the standard formulas, I re-derive and
re-implement them so I understand exactly what each one assumes and where it
breaks.

**Every entry follows the same template:**

- the equation itself,
- what each symbol means,
- a plain-English explanation,
- why it matters in markets,
- a simple worked numerical example,
- a Python implementation,
- a manual / Excel calculation,
- a real financial-market example,
- and the common mistakes people make with it.

## Published entries

::: {.status-note}
Published one at a time, to the standard above. The roadmap below is the plan.
:::

::: {#published-equations}
:::

## The roadmap

::: {.roadmap}

### Core statistics
[Mean return](mean-return/) · [variance](variance-standard-deviation/) · [standard deviation](variance-standard-deviation/) · [covariance](covariance-correlation/) · [correlation](covariance-correlation/) ·
[skewness](skewness-kurtosis/) · [kurtosis](skewness-kurtosis/) · [Z-score](z-score-normal/) · [normal distribution](z-score-normal/) · [t-statistic](t-stat-p-value/) · [p-value](t-stat-p-value/) ·
[confidence interval](t-stat-p-value/).

### Quant finance
[Simple return](returns/) · [log return](returns/) · [cumulative return](returns/) · [volatility](variance-standard-deviation/) · [annualised return](annualisation/) ·
[annualised volatility](annualisation/) · [Sharpe ratio](sharpe-ratio/) · [Sortino ratio](sortino-ratio/) · [maximum drawdown](maximum-drawdown/) ·
[Value at Risk](value-at-risk/) · [Expected Shortfall](value-at-risk/) · [beta](beta-capm/) · [alpha](beta-capm/) · [CAPM](beta-capm/) · [Kelly criterion](kelly-criterion/) ·
[CAGR](cagr/) · [profit factor](trading-metrics/) · [win rate](trading-metrics/) · [expectancy](trading-metrics/).

### Time series
[Autocorrelation](autocorrelation/) · [moving average](moving-averages/) · [exponential moving average](moving-averages/) · AR model ·
MA model · ARIMA · GARCH · Hurst exponent · cointegration · [stationarity](stationarity-adf/) ·
[Augmented Dickey–Fuller test](stationarity-adf/).

### Machine-learning mathematics
Cost function · gradient descent · mean squared error · cross-entropy loss ·
sigmoid · softmax · entropy · information gain · Gini impurity · regularisation ·
L1 and L2 penalties · backpropagation.

:::
